title: About
content: Mortise & Marrow is a one-person woodworking blog about hand tools, joinery, and small-shop furniture building.

title: Contact
content: Questions or shop photos? Reach me at marion@mortiseandmarrow.com. I read every message.

title: Tool List
content: The hand tools I reach for most, with notes on what is worth spending on and what is not.

title: Start Here
content: New to hand tool woodworking? These are the posts to read first, in order.

title: Resources
content: Books, videos, and suppliers I trust for hand tools, lumber, and finishing.

title: Sharpening Guide
content: Everything on this site about sharpening chisels, plane irons, and scrapers, in one place.

title: Joinery Index
content: A running index of the joinery posts: dovetails, mortise and tenon, splined miters, and more.

title: Finishing Guide
content: Oil, wax, and shellac schedules collected from the finishing posts, with what to use where.

title: Workbench Guide
content: The bench builds and workholding posts gathered together, from slab tops to leg vises.

title: Lumber Guide
content: Choosing, milling, and storing hardwood, plus notes on the species I use most.

title: Subscribe
content: New posts land every couple weeks. Drop your email to get them in your inbox.

title: Frequently Asked Questions
content: Common questions about tools, stock, and the shop, answered in one place.

title: Shop Setup
content: A look at the one-car garage shop: layout, storage, and how it all rolls out of the way.

title: Glossary
content: Plain-language definitions for the joinery and hand-tool terms used around the site.

title: Projects Index
content: Every full build write-up on the site, newest first, with a photo of each finished piece.

title: Privacy Policy
content: How the newsletter list and site comments are handled. Short version: nothing gets sold.

title: Tool Reviews Index
content: A running list of the hand tools reviewed here, with a quick buy or skip on each.

title: Beginner Tool Kit
content: The minimum hand-tool kit to start cutting real joinery, with rough prices and where to buy.

title: Guest Posts
content: Want to write a build or technique post for the site? Here is what I'm looking for.

title: Draft: Video Index
content: Rough page to collect the shop clips once there are enough of them. Not live yet.
